use_cases: Displaying user avatars with online/offline/busy/away status indicators in dashboards
Team member lists showing availability status
User profile cards with real-time presence indicators
Chat or messaging interfaces displaying contact status
Comment sections showing user avatars with presence indicators
ai_summary: A reusable avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives and class-variance-authority. Features multiple sub-components (Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, AvatarStatus) with status variants including online, offline, busy, and away states. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a flat, minimal aesthetic suitable for SaaS dashboards and social platforms.
